PostToolUse.command: cd "C:/Users/c.biber/Documents/APP/schwarzplan" && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -10; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json 2>&1 | head -10

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(package-lock\.json|resources/icon)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: This file is protected. Edit manually if needed.' >&2; exit 1; fi
